description: Proficiency at the intermediate level in listening, speaking, reading and writing, using communicative approaches. Students with prior experience in the language are required to take a placement test administered by the department. Not open to students with credit for LCA LANG 418 prior to Fall 2019.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: ASIALANG 229(or LCA LANG 417 prior to Fall 2019) orASIALANG 357or placement intoASIALANG 230

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: ASIALANG 229(or LCA LANG 417 prior to Fall 2019) orASIALANG 357or placement intoASIALANG 230
